mapper.select: SELECT id, policy_code, display_name, description, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_json, '$')) AS config_json, schedule_type, active, last_run_at, last_run_status, last_run_message, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_system_policy ORDER BY policy_code

SELECT id, policy_code, display_name, description, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(config_json, '$')) AS config_json, schedule_type, active, last_run_at, last_run_status, last_run_message, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_system_policy WHERE policy_code = #{policyCode}
